Publications

Note: Underlined authors indicate my Ph.D. students and postdocs.

2026

Lstibůrek, M., Bittner, V., Solvin, T.M., Korecký, J., and Steffenrem A. (2026). Identifying optimal sets of individuals under a pairwise genomic relationship threshold for breeding and conservation. Genetics, 233(2), iyag095.
⭐ Featured Article [ Journal ] [ GitHub Code ]

Sagariya, C., Bittner, V., Pook, T., Roy, A., and Lstibůrek, M. (2026). Impact of erroneous marker data on the accuracy of narrow-sense heritability. Genetics, 232(1), iyaf230. [Journal] [PDF] [GitHub Code]

Štěpánová, K., Lhotáková, Z., Neuwirthová, E., Kupková, L., Červená, L., Raasch, F., Potůčková, M., Stejskal, J., Čepl, J., Campbell, P., Lstibůrek, M., Albrechtová, J. (2026). Scots pine seedlings of lowland and upland ecotypes respond differently to drought detected by needle functional traits and spectral reflectance. BMC Plant Biology, 26, 261. [Journal] [PDF]

Neuwirthová, E., Chuchlík, J., Pikl, M., Lhotáková, Z., Kashkan, I., Panzarová, K., Stejskal, J., Albrechtová, J., Lstibůrek, M., Čepl, J. (2026). Overcoming difficulties in segmentation of hyperspectral plant images with small projection areas using machine learning. Scientific Reports, 16, 4325. [Journal] [PDF]

2025

Jeon, K., Kim, Y., Kang, K.S., Sagariya, C., Lstibůrek, M. (2025). Incorporating specific combining ability into selective seed harvest significantly increases genetic gain: a simulation study on Korean red pine. Tree Genetics & Genomes, 21(5), 26. [Journal] [GitHub Code]

Sagariya, C., Steffenrem, A., Gezan, S., Pook, T., García-Gil, R., Kastally, C., Pyhäjärvi, T., Lstibůrek, M. (2025). The heritability accuracy in forest tree breeding programs relying on random mating. Scandinavian Journal of Forest Research, 40(5-6), 292-302. [Journal] [PDF]

Chludil, D., Čepl, J., Steffenrem, A., Stejskal, J., Sagariya, C., Pook, T., Schueler, S., Korecký, J., Almqvist, C., Chakraborty, D., Berlin, M., Lstibůrek, M. (2025). A pollen-based assisted migration for rapid forest adaptation. Global Change Biology, 31(1), e70014. [Journal] [PDF]

Chludil, D., Almquist, C., Berlin, M., Steffenrem, A., McKeand, S.E., Korecký, J., Stejskal, J., Čepl, J., Isik, F., Chakraborty, D., Schueler, S., Pook, T., Sagariya, C., Lstibůrek, M. (2025). Alleviating the concerns about pollen-based assisted migration. Global Change Biology, 31(6), e70262. [Journal] [PDF]

Neuwirthová, E., Stejskal, J., Lhotáková, Z., Korecký, J., Čepl, J., Nikodem, A., Panzarová, K., Albrechtová, J., Lstibůrek, M. (2025). Drought response and genetic variation in Scots pine seedlings’ provenances: insights from high-throughput phenotyping for climate-resilient forestry. Evolutionary Applications, 18, e70157. [Journal] [PDF]

Provazník, D., Stejskal, J., Lhotáková, Z., Čepl, J., Neuwirthová, E., Nofrizal, A.Y., Korecký, J., Červená, L., Kupková, L., Klápště, J., Hansen, J.K., Gezan, S.A., Campbell, P., Lstibůrek, M., Albrechtová, J. (2025). Needle‐ and canopy‐level genetic variation in Scots pine (Pinus sylvestris L.) revealed by hyperspectral phenotyping across sites and seasons. Evolutionary Applications, 18, e70176. [Journal] [PDF]

2024

Chakraborty, D., Ciceu, A., Ballian, D., Benito, G.M., Bolte, A., Bozic, G., Buchacher, R., Čepl, J., Cremer, E., Ducousso, A., Gaviria, J., George, J.P., Hardtke, A., Ivankovic, M., Klisz, M., Kowalczyk, J., Kremer, A., Lstibůrek, M., Longauer, R., Mihai, G., Nagy, L., Petkova, K., Popov, E., Schirmer, R., Skrøppa, T., Solvin, T.M., Steffenrem, A., Stejskal, J., Stojnic, S., Volmer, K., Schueler, S. 2023

Poupon, V., Gezan, S.A., Schueler, S., Lstibůrek, M. (2023). Genotype x environment interaction and climate sensitivity in growth and wood density of European larch. Forest Ecology and Management, 545, 121259. [Journal] [PDF]

2007

2006

2005

2004

Lstibůrek, M., Mullin, T.J., Lindgren, D., Rosvall, O. (2004). Open-nucleus breeding strategies compared with population-wide positive assortative mating. II. Unequal distribution of testing effort. Theoretical and Applied Genetics, 109(6), 1169-1177. [Journal] [PDF]

Lstibůrek, M., Mullin, T.J., Lindgren, D., Rosvall, O. (2004). Open-nucleus breeding strategies compared with population-wide positive assortative mating. I. Equal distribution of testing effort. Theoretical and Applied Genetics, 109(6), 1196-1203. [Journal] [PDF]
